description: Synthetic labelled-break oracle for the W2 reconciliation substrate. Each record is a deliberately-injected break between the internal book and the synthetic external comparator feed (custodian holdings/cash + administrator statement). The taxonomy is E-24 Reconciliation Break's vocabulary (reconciliation_type / cause_classification / materiality). This manifest is the zero-missed-breaks ground truth: a reconciliation engine run over the feed must detect exactly these breaks and no others.

breaks.description: custodian USD-translates POS-0004 at a different FX rate (178199.70 difference)
custodian marks POS-0012 63373.84 above the internal IBOR mark

trade booked trade-date internally but settlement-date by the custodian for POS-0022 (TD/SD timing; custodian lags 2582 units — the in-flight trade quantity)

custodian marks POS-0015 462341.63 above the internal IBOR mark — one of a pricing PAIR that coincidentally shares a value ratio (adversarial: the rule reads a shared ratio as systematic fx)
custodian marks POS-0016 77089.13 away from the internal IBOR mark — a pricing break whose value ratio COLLIDES with the fx pair's ratio (adversarial: the rule clusters it as fx)

the internal IBOR book value and the E-07 mark for POS-0019 diverge by 366938.99 while the custodian agrees with the book — the dual-independent-pipeline genuinely DISAGREES (Pipeline A clears, Pipeline B mark breaks); surfaced as a pipeline-disagreement break

IBOR vs ABOR market value for POS-0019 diverges by 366938.99 with NO timing, accrual or cost-basis class to explain it — the of-record engine classification lands `unexplained` (true cause `pricing`, the same stale-price corruption as the A/B case BRK-0024 on a second surface; the rule-discovery corpus)

IBOR vs ABOR QUANTITY for POS-0035 diverges by 1850 units with NO value impact and NO in-flight trade (so no timing class) and no accrual/cost-basis class — the engine lands `unexplained` (true cause `data_error`, a quantity corruption with no rule signal; the second rule-unreachable break)
administrator cash balance for PF-0002 disagrees with the custodian by 118052 (cash reconciliation break)

administrator records transaction ADMIN-TXN-EXTRA-02 that is absent from the internal book (a second missing/extra-transaction instance — the engine surfaces it via the transaction matcher's external-only direction)

the administrator's fund-level NAV for PF-0003 diverges from the internally-derivable NAV (Sigma the ABOR marks + accrued income, the canonical NAV identity) by 125922.72 (~12 bp, beyond the 1 bp band) — a shadow-NAV divergence case (the SD-12.16 oversight input; NOT a reconcile surface)
